chunks.text: Let's know some facts of these big companies that 99% people don't know.
First of all, Google's name was not Google but Google.
What do you want to say?
I mean Google's spelling is wrong because the spelling had to be G-O-G-O-L.
But while registering the domain, they put the spelling wrong.
Next, Audi, Bentley, Lamborghini, Porsche, Skoda and all the companies you see on the screen.
All these luxury car manufacturers come under Volkswagen Group.
And Volkswagen Cars was indirectly founded by Adolf Hitler.
Next, HP company was made by Bill Hewlett and Dave Packard.
So, the name of the company would be Hewlett Packard or Packard Hewlett.
They decided this by tossing the dice.
But if toss Packard won, then today we know HP as PH.

result: Let's know some facts of these big companies that 99% people don't know. First of all, Google's name was not Google but Google. What do you want to say? I mean Google's spelling is wrong because the spelling had to be G-O-G-O-L. But while registering the domain, they put the spelling wrong. G-O-O-G-L-E Next, Audi, Bentley, Lamborghini, Porsche, Skoda and all the companies you see on the screen. All these luxury car manufacturers come under Volkswagen Group. And Volkswagen Cars was indirectly founded by Adolf Hitler. Next, HP company was made by Bill Hewlett and Dave Packard. So, the name of the company would be Hewlett Packard or Packard Hewlett. They decided this by tossing the dice. In which Hewlett won. But if toss Packard won, then today we know HP as PH. Thanks for watching!
